resources.name: Repository README
resources.purpose: Defines the project purpose, conceptual model, repository structure, guiding principles, development method, and current status

resources.name: System Design Overview
resources.purpose: Provides the initial long-form vocabulary, principles, distinctions, priorities, and lesson structure for practical system design
resources.notes: This is the active foundation draft. Material may later be reorganized into formal lessons under docs/.

resources.name: Project Entry Page
resources.purpose: Serves as the planned static entrance to project documentation, lessons, examples, and experiments
resources.notes: The file exists as a placeholder, but the public entry page has not yet been built or published.

resources.name: Configuration Guide
resources.purpose: Defines the scope, security rules, formatting standards, lifecycle values, and maintenance policy for repository configuration

resources.name: Resource Registry
resources.purpose: Identifies important repository and external resources, their locations, purposes, access levels, scopes, and lifecycle status
resources.notes: This record describes the registry itself.

resources.name: Task App Example
resources.purpose: Provides the first sandbox for testing a small human-centered task workflow
resources.notes: The example structure exists, but its interface and design documentation are not yet complete.

resources.name: System Events Sheet
resources.purpose: Will store workflow events, current state, and completion records for a sandbox experiment
resources.notes: No verified public-safe location is currently recorded.

resources.name: Start Test Form
resources.purpose: Will provide a deliberate trigger for starting a sandbox workflow test
resources.notes: No verified public-safe location is currently recorded.
